heading: Frequently Asked Questions
subheading: Everything you need to know before booking

faqs.question: Where do you teach mahjong?
faqs.answer: We host private lessons and office workshops throughout New York City — including Manhattan, Brooklyn, and Queens. For office workshops and private lessons, we'll come to you.

faqs.question: Do I need to know mahjong to book a session?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our students start as complete beginners. We'll teach you the tiles, the flow of the game, how to score with points, and basic strategy so you'll feel confident sitting down at any table.

faqs.question: Do you teach Hong Kong-style or American mahjong?
faqs.answer: We specialize in Hong Kong-style mahjong, which is widely played across Asia and in Chinese diaspora communities. If you've played American mahjong before, we'll happily walk you through the differences.

faqs.question: Can you host a mahjong workshop at our office?
faqs.answer: Yes — office workshops are one of our most popular offerings. We bring tiles, mats, and instructors to your space. Workshops rates are listed above and we accommodate for groups of 8–24. We invoice through Stripe and accept credit cards.

faqs.question: How do I book a session?
faqs.answer: Email us at events@luckycatmahjong.com or DM us on Instagram at @luckycat.mahjong. Tell us the type of session you're interested in, your group size, and a few dates and times that could work — we'll take it from there.

faqs.question: I'm a business owner or manager interested in collaborating. Where do I begin?
faqs.answer: We’d love to connect! The best way to start is by sending us a DM on Instagram. Drop us a message with a quick intro, and we’ll check out your brand and content to make sure there's great synergy for a joint event. As part of the collaboration, we'll promote your brand through our stories, posts, and reels—our event content typically draws around 20k to 30k views with high engagement metrics (we're happy to share screenshots), giving us a good potential to go viral together. From there, we can chat about potential dates, logistics, and pricing to see how we can bring an incredible experience to life.
